The '''attack''' on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] was an offensive by the [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuins]] during the [[Duinuogwuin Contention]] that ravaged the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==The attack==
The attack occurred in [[15,500 BBY]] when scouts of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] discovered the [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuins]].
Hundreds of Duinuogwuins followed the scouts back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where they began attacking the city.

==Aftermath==
A peace treaty was soon worked out between the Republic's [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]], [[Fillorean]], and the Duinuogwuin philosopher, [[Borz'Mat'oh]]. Following the end of the battle, the two founded the [[University of Coruscant/Legends|University of Coruscant]].
